---
title: "VacancyRadar — Skill Landscape"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
import duckdb
import polars as pl
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.io as pio
pio.templates.default = "plotly_white"

import os
PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent if "__file__" in globals() else Path.cwd()
if not (PROJECT_ROOT / "derived").exists():
    PROJECT_ROOT = Path(os.environ.get("VRADAR_ROOT", "D:/VacancyRadar"))
_slim_override = os.environ.get("VRADAR_SLIM_PATH")
SLIM = Path(_slim_override) if _slim_override else PROJECT_ROOT / "derived" / "slim_active.parquet"
con = duckdb.connect(":memory:")
con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW slim AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{SLIM.as_posix()}')")
```

## Top-30 навыков в активных вакансиях

```{python}
top_skills = con.execute(
    """
    SELECT skill, count(*)::INT AS n,
        round(avg(salary_rub_min) FILTER (WHERE salary_rub_min IS NOT NULL))::BIGINT AS avg_salary
    FROM slim, unnest(skills) AS t(skill)
    WHERE skill IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY skill ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 30
    """
).pl()
top_skills
```

```{python}
if not top_skills.is_empty():
    fig = px.bar(top_skills.to_pandas(), x="n", y="skill", orientation="h",
                 hover_data=["avg_salary"],
                 labels={"n": "упоминаний", "skill": ""},
                 title="Top-30 навыков (mentions count)")
    fig.update_layout(yaxis={"categoryorder": "total ascending"}, height=720, margin={"l": 160})
    fig
```

## Co-occurrence matrix (топ-15)

```{python}
top15 = top_skills.head(15)["skill"].to_list()
if top15:
    placeholders = ",".join("?" * len(top15))
    cooc = con.execute(
        f"""
        WITH active_skills AS (
            SELECT vacancy_id, list_filter(skills, x -> x IN ({placeholders})) AS s
            FROM slim WHERE skills IS NOT NULL AND len(skills) > 0
        )
        SELECT a AS skill_a, b AS skill_b, count(*)::INT AS n
        FROM active_skills, unnest(s) AS t1(a), unnest(s) AS t2(b)
        WHERE a < b AND a IN ({placeholders}) AND b IN ({placeholders})
        GROUP BY a, b
        ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 50
        """,
        top15 * 3,
    ).pl()
    cooc
```

```{python}
if top15 and not cooc.is_empty():
    pivot = cooc.to_pandas().pivot(index="skill_a", columns="skill_b", values="n").fillna(0)
    fig = px.imshow(pivot, color_continuous_scale="Blues",
                    labels={"x": "", "y": "", "color": "пары"},
                    title="Skill co-occurrence (топ-15)")
    fig.update_layout(height=520)
    fig
```

---

*Сгенерировано VacancyRadar / `{python} f"{datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}"`*
